steps.term: fun X => fun relation => forall (Motive : forall (x : X), Prop), forall (step : forall (x : X), forall (previous : forall (y : X), forall (related : relation y x), Motive y), Motive x), forall (x : X), Motive x

fun X => fun relation => fun Result => forall (P : Prop), forall (mk : forall (well_founded : @WellFoundedPredicate.{u} X relation), forall (step : forall (x : X), forall (previous : forall (y : X), forall (related : relation y x), Result y), Result x), forall (value : forall (x : X), Result x), P), P
fun X => fun relation => fun well_founded => fun Motive => fun step => fun x => well_founded Motive step x

fun X => fun relation => fun Result => fun well_founded => fun step => fun value => fun (P : Prop) => fun (mk : forall (well_founded : @WellFoundedPredicate.{u} X relation), forall (step : forall (x : X), forall (previous : forall (y : X), forall (related : relation y x), Result y), Result x), forall (value : forall (x : X), Result x), P) => mk well_founded step value

fun X => fun relation => fun Result => fun interface => interface (@WellFoundedPredicate.{u} X relation) (fun (well_founded : @WellFoundedPredicate.{u} X relation) => fun (step : forall (x : X), forall (previous : forall (y : X), forall (related : relation y x), Result y), Result x) => fun (value : forall (x : X), Result x) => well_founded)
